label: Jessica — playful & bright (best bubbly pick)
notes: American female. Playful, bright, warm — great for fun animal facts. Search Voice Library: Jessica. Premade ID from ElevenLabs public voice listings.

label: Gigi — cartoon kid voice
notes: American female, young, childish animation style. Very kid-like — can sound younger than other picks. Search: Gigi.

label: Freya — energetic & hyped
notes: American female, young, overhyped/energetic (video-game vibe). Bubbly and excited. Search: Freya.

label: Elli — warm emotional narrator
notes: American female, young, emotional narration. Softer than Freya but still expressive. Search: Elli.

label: Domi — confident & punchy
notes: American female, young, strong/confident. Less soft, more upbeat energy. Search: Domi.

label: Dorothy — storybook (British accent)
notes: British female, young, pleasant — labeled for children's stories. Skip if you want American only. Search: Dorothy.

label: Nicole — soft & gentle
notes: American female, young, soft/whispery. Calm rather than bubbly — good for bedtime facts. Search: Nicole.

label: Mimi — animation (Swedish accent)
notes: Swedish-accent female, young, childish animation. Cute but not American. Search: Mimi.

label: Matilda — calm professional alto
notes: Professional warm alto — friendly but not cartoon-bubbly. Search: Matilda.

label: Community: search bubbly / children
notes: In Voice Library search: bubbly, children, cartoon, enthusiastic, young. Filter Language: English, Accent: American. Add voice to My Voices, then Copy voice ID.
